market_note: Stablecoin transaction volume hit a record $1.79T in June 2026, even as regulators race a July 18 deadline to finalize GENIUS Act rules.

stablecoin_items.headline: 140+ Firm Consortium Launches Open USD to Rival USDC
stablecoin_items.summary: Stripe, Visa, Mastercard, Coinbase, BNY and Bank of America are among 140+ partners backing Open USD, a new dollar stablecoin that shares yield with businesses that mint and route it. It launches first on Solana, directly challenging Circle's $73.4B USDC.

stablecoin_items.headline: GENIUS Act Rulemaking Deadline Hits July 18
stablecoin_items.summary: Six federal agencies tasked with finalizing GENIUS Act stablecoin rules have until July 18 to publish the joint framework, a key milestone for U.S. stablecoin oversight.

stablecoin_items.headline: EU MiCA Transitional Period Ends
stablecoin_items.summary: As of July 1, every Crypto-Asset Service Provider operating in the EU must hold full MiCA authorization or cease operations, tightening the bloc's stablecoin and crypto services regime.

stablecoin_items.headline: Stablecoin Volume Hits Record $1.79T in June
stablecoin_items.summary: June's adjusted stablecoin transaction volume rose 63% month-over-month and 125% year-over-year, with USDC gaining ground on USDT amid new competitive launches.

hack_items.headline: KelpDAO Exploit Ranks as 2026's Biggest Hack So Far
hack_items.summary: Attackers drained roughly $294M from KelpDAO in a sophisticated, state-directed operation involving infrastructure compromise rather than a simple contract bug, per TRM Labs.

hack_items.headline: Drift Protocol Breach Adds ~$285M to 2026 Losses
hack_items.summary: A separate exploit hit Solana-based Drift Protocol for approximately $285M, reinforcing 2026's trend toward large, coordinated DeFi attacks over opportunistic bugs.

hack_items.headline: North Korea-Linked Groups Behind 66% of H1 2026 Hack Losses
hack_items.summary: Crypto hacks hit record frequency in H1 2026, but total losses fell below $1B; North Korean-linked actors are tied to roughly $643M of that total, per TRM Labs.

hack_items.headline: Trust Wallet Confirms 2,596 Wallets Drained for $7M
hack_items.summary: Trust Wallet disclosed a theft attack that drained 2,596 user wallets for a combined $7 million, adding to a wave of mass wallet-drain incidents across EVM chains this year.
